title: wedelia diffusiflora
intro: Wedelia diffusiflora, also known as the butterfly weed or elephant ear, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is known to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues, skin problems, and digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Wedelia diffusiflora typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
